plugins.name: command-center
plugins.description: Turn any firm into a Cowork-automated operation. Drop any mix of files into one shared inbox; the intake skill auto-detects each file's type, routes it to the right process (receipt filing, photo sorting incl. report-scan archiving, daily reports, invoicing), asks only the unavoidable questions, and opens one interactive review board to collect approvals and save them in a single click. Onboard the firm once — every process inherits the context. Invoicing supports an optional Montagebau/Service-Report preset (separate Montage-/Fahrt-Sätze, independent Sa/So-Zuschlag, per-vehicle Geräte-Abrechnung).

plugins.name: jan-kapitalfluss
plugins.description: Approval-gated Commerzbank -> Kapitalflusstabelle + Liquiditätsplanung automation (Jan Theobald). Sorts every income and expense of one Commerzbank business account into the table by sign (account-wide, not per-store). Plans monthly writes from a CSV export, shows a change-overview, writes into the existing Excel files only after explicit approval. GoBD-archived.

plugins.name: trendfinder
plugins.description: Trend data → content decisions in Cowork. Detect-first onboarding (Trendfinder API key, Apify MCP connector for on-demand scrapes, niches, optional 24/7 schedules, optional first avatar); skills for on-demand scraping, trend-radar, trend-briefing (Live Artifact), scheduling, and avatar-studio (brand + persona + DNA); script-studio (avatar-voiced hooks + scripts matched to trends natively), plus the Trendfinder-Cockpit. Every skill ends with an interactive next-step option block. AI synthesis runs natively in Cowork; backend only stores and scrapes.
